name: Daily Driven Racer
short_description: Daily Driven Racer blends classic arcade spirit with modern simcade handling. Race a variety of everyday cars through engaging tracks, complete solo challenges, or play with friends in up to 4-player local split screen. Modes include Cops and Robbers, Battle, Circuit races, Ball Game and more.
detailed_description:
Daily Driven Racer is a racing game built for precision and chaos. Master corners in classic circuit and sprint events, or jump into split screen mayhem with up to four players across Cops and Robbers, Battle, Cruise, and Ball Game modes. The lineup features familiar everyday cars: compact, clunky, or unexpectedly quick. DDR delivers fast and flexible gameplay with instant setup and no grind

Single Player Features:

  • Grand Tour Mode (Arcade): Race through a progressive series of events and conquer the tour.

  • Circuit Race: Challenge AI opponents across various track layouts.

  • Sprint Race: Short, point-to-point races against AI.

  • Challenges Mode: Face off in 1v1 races or complete timed challenges.

  • Time Trial: Race against yourself to perfect your lines and lap times.

  • Ball Game: Play Football/Soccer with AI in a 2v2 match with Jump and Boost ability to shoot.

  • Cruise Mode: Free roam with Jump and Boost abilities to explore around.

  • Unlockable Progression: Earn new cars by completing game modes and challenges.

Split-Screen Multiplayer:

  • Up to 4 players in local split-screen racing.

  • Circuit & Sprint Races: Race against friends, AI, or a mix of both.

  • Cops and Robbers Mode: One player is the cop, the other the robber—chase, steal gold, and deliver it in high-stakes pursuits.

  • Battle Mode: Engage in vehicular combat with unique boost or jump mechanics. Last car standing wins.

  • Ball Game: Play Football/Soccer in a 2v2 match with Jump and Boost ability to shoot.

  • Cruise Mode: Free roam with Jump and Boost abilities to explore around with friends.
